{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212249209E36FADD4B24503FAED6"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7470905359870116633","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我的菜，主角有理想不冲动，有挂不会有世间无我这般人，群像挺好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739460078,"group_id":"7337639599969143833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"颜良声名易取，文丑又能中举。惊觉深陷困局，不过一只棋。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+IhOdpFmySK00fSda8glFPXtpqDQ2uVSK2jwZNs6cy1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e57077010c343f4bda65e3d79ca0220~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624277&x-signature=pOZzQK9%2F6HF02O5gTS1059ryJAQ%3D","user_id":"1424563730134911","user_name":"随风起ljr"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1424563730134911","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7337639599969143833","book_info":{"abstract":"街头的小打小闹该结束了，全面战争将接管这个时代。
数以百计的百夫长攻城机甲伴随着成千上万辆天启坦克一起从烟尘中驶出。
无数蜻蜓无人机的掩护下，密密麻麻的V2火箭炮缓缓前进。
时不时飞过的风暴之子战机为战场留下阵阵轰鸣。
遮天蔽日的基洛夫飞艇下，密集的天火防空坦克与玄武战斗要塞时刻待命。
成群的阿库拉导弹潜艇与企业级航母正在世界各处支援。
天空、海洋、陆地，战争将接管每个角落。
就连隐秘的地方，谭雅、莫拉莱斯、沃尔科夫等英雄也在隐秘潜入，进行着战斗。
过往的秩序终会崩塌，世界也将迎来他原本的样子。
……
“钢铁的领袖早已逝去，但领袖的钢铁却从未生锈。”
“这个赛博朋克的世界很需要变革。”
“你说对吗？亲爱的尤里。”
（赛博朋克2077往日之影×边缘行者，红警×心灵终结等mod）
